original: Robert F. Kennedy once said that a country’s GDP measures “everything except that which makes life worthwhile.”
translation_literal: 罗伯特·F·肯尼迪曾说，一个国家的 GDP 衡量“除使生活有价值的东西之外的一切”。

chunks.english: that a country’s GDP measures “everything except that which makes life worthwhile”
chunks.chinese: 一个国家的 GDP 衡量除使生活有价值的东西之外的一切

chunks.english: everything except that which makes life worthwhile
chunks.chinese: 除使生活有价值的东西之外的一切

sentence_patterns.pattern_name: 分裂结构 / 间隔结构
sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 宾语 everything + except + that + which 从句
sentence_patterns.explanation: which 从句修饰 that，说明 GDP 没有衡量的真正内容。

original: With Britain voting to leave the European Union, and GDP already predicted to slow as a result, it is now a timely moment to assess what he was referring to.
translation_literal: 随着英国投票决定离开欧盟，并且 GDP 已经被预测会因此放缓，现在正是评估他所指内容的及时刻。

chunks.english: With Britain voting to leave the European Union, and GDP already predicted to slow as a result
chunks.chinese: 随着英国投票决定离开欧盟，并且 GDP 已被预测会因此放缓

chunks.english: Britain voting to leave the European Union
chunks.chinese: 英国投票决定离开欧盟

chunks.english: GDP already predicted to slow as a result
chunks.chinese: GDP 已经被预测会因此放缓

chunks.english: to assess what he was referring to
chunks.relation: 真正主语，对应形式主语 it

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: it is + 名词 + to do
sentence_patterns.explanation: it 是形式主语，真正主语是 to assess...。
句首 with 结构里两个背景并列，说明评估 GDP 的现实语境。

original: The question of GDP and its usefulness has annoyed policymakers for over half a century.
translation_literal: GDP 及其有用性的问题已经困扰政策制定者超过半个世纪。

chunks.english: The question of GDP and its usefulness
chunks.chinese: GDP 及其有用性的问题

chunks.relation: 说明 annoyed 的持续时间

original: Many argue that it is a flawed concept.
translation_literal: 许多人认为它是一个有缺陷的概念。

chunks.english: that it is a flawed concept
chunks.chinese: 它是一个有缺陷的概念

chunks.relation: 宾语从句内部主语，指 GDP

original: It measures things that do not matter and misses things that do.
translation_literal: 它衡量不重要的东西，却漏掉重要的东西。

chunks.relation: 修饰 things，do 代替 matter

sentence_patterns.explanation: 第二个定语从句中 do 代替 matter，避免重复。

original: By most recent measures, the UK’s GDP has been the envy of the Western world, with record low unemployment and high growth figures.
translation_literal: 按照多数最新指标，英国的 GDP 一直是西方世界羡慕的对象，伴随着创纪录的低失业率和高增长数字。

chunks.english: the envy of the Western world
chunks.relation: 作 has been 的表语

chunks.english: with record low unemployment and high growth figures
chunks.chinese: 伴随着创纪录的低失业率和高增长数字
chunks.relation: 补充说明 GDP 表现好的具体表现

sentence_patterns.explanation: with 后两个经济指标并列，说明 GDP 令人羡慕的原因。

original: If everything was going so well, then why did over 17 million people vote for Brexit, despite the warnings about what it could do to their country’s economic prospects?
translation_literal: 如果一切进展如此顺利，那么为什么超过 1700 万人不顾关于脱欧可能对国家经济前景造成什么影响的警告，投票支持脱欧呢？

chunks.english: If everything was going so well
chunks.chinese: 如果一切进展如此顺利
chunks.relation: 说明疑问主句的条件背景
作 vote for 的宾语

chunks.english: despite the warnings about what it could do to their country’s economic prospects
chunks.chinese: 尽管有关于它可能对国家经济前景造成什么影响的警告
chunks.relation: 说明 vote for 的让步背景

chunks.english: what it could do to their country’s economic prospects
chunks.chinese: 它可能对国家经济前景造成什么影响

chunks.relation: what 从句内部主语，指 Brexit

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: why + did + 主语 + 动词原形
sentence_patterns.explanation: 特殊疑问句中助动词 did 提前，主语是 over 17 million people。

original: A recent annual study of countries and their ability to convert growth into well-being sheds some light on that question.
translation_literal: 一项关于各国及其将增长转化为福祉能力的近期年度研究，为那个问题提供了一些解释。

chunks.english: A recent annual study of countries and their ability to convert growth into well-being
chunks.chinese: 一项关于各国及其将增长转化为福祉能力的近期年度研究

chunks.english: of countries and their ability to convert growth into well-being
chunks.chinese: 关于各国及其将增长转化为福祉能力的
对那个问题的一些解释

original: Across the 163 countries measured, the UK is one of the poorest performers in ensuring that economic growth is translated into meaningful improvements for its citizens.
translation_literal: 在被衡量的 163 个国家中，英国是在确保经济增长转化为对公民有意义的改善方面表现最差的国家之一。

chunks.chinese: 在被衡量的 163 个国家中

chunks.english: one of the poorest performers in ensuring that economic growth is translated into meaningful improvements for its citizens
chunks.chinese: 在确保经济增长转化为对公民有意义的改善方面表现最差的国家之一

chunks.english: in ensuring that economic growth is translated into meaningful improvements for its citizens
chunks.chinese: 在确保经济增长转化为对公民有意义的改善方面

chunks.english: that economic growth is translated into meaningful improvements for its citizens
chunks.chinese: 经济增长被转化为对公民有意义的改善

chunks.english: into meaningful improvements for its citizens
chunks.chinese: 成为对公民有意义的改善
chunks.relation: 说明 translated 的结果方向

sentence_patterns.pattern_name: 分裂结构 / 间隔结构
sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 表语中嵌入 ensuring + that 从句
sentence_patterns.explanation: one of the poorest performers 后的 in ensuring... 才说明“表现差”在哪方面。

original: Rather than just focusing on GDP, over 40 different sets of criteria from health, education and civil society engagement have been measured to get a more rounded assessment of how countries are performing.
translation_literal: 不仅仅关注 GDP，而是衡量了来自健康、教育和公民社会参与等方面的 40 多套不同标准，以便更全面地评估各国表现如何。

chunks.english: Rather than just focusing on GDP
over 40 different sets of criteria from health, education and civil society engagement
chunks.chinese: 来自健康、教育和公民社会参与等方面的 40 多套不同标准

chunks.english: from health, education and civil society engagement
chunks.chinese: 来自健康、教育和公民社会参与等方面的

chunks.english: to get a more rounded assessment of how countries are performing
chunks.chinese: 为了获得对各国表现如何的更全面评估

chunks.relation: 作 assessment of 的宾语

sentence_patterns.pattern_name: 分裂结构 / 间隔结构
sentence_patterns.pattern_form: Rather than... + 被动主句 + to do
sentence_patterns.explanation: 句首 Rather than... 是对照状语，真正主干是 criteria have been measured。

original: While all of these countries face their own challenges, there are a number of consistent themes.
translation_literal: 尽管所有这些国家都面临各自的挑战，但仍有许多一致的主题。

chunks.english: While all of these countries face their own challenges
chunks.chinese: 尽管所有这些国家都面临各自的挑战
chunks.relation: 说明主句成立的让步背景

chunks.english: there are a number of consistent themes

chunks.relation: there be 结构中的真实主语

sentence_patterns.explanation: While 在这里表示“尽管”，不是时间。

original: Yes, there has been a budding economic recovery since the 2008 global crash, but in key indicators in areas such as health and education, major economies have continued to decline.
translation_literal: 是的，自 2008 年全球崩盘以来，经济复苏已经开始萌芽，但是在健康和教育等领域的关键指标上，主要经济体继续下滑。

chunks.english: there has been a budding economic recovery since the 2008 global crash
chunks.chinese: 自 2008 年全球崩盘以来已经有了萌芽中的经济复苏

chunks.relation: there be 结构真实主语

chunks.chinese: 自 2008 年全球崩盘以来
chunks.relation: 说明 has been 的时间

chunks.english: but in key indicators in areas such as health and education, major economies have continued to decline
chunks.chinese: 但是在健康和教育等领域的关键指标上，主要经济体继续下滑

chunks.english: in key indicators in areas such as health and education
chunks.chinese: 在健康和教育等领域的关键指标上

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: there has been..., but ... have continued...
sentence_patterns.explanation: but 连接复苏和关键指标下滑的对比。

original: Yet this isn’t the case with all countries.
translation_literal: 然而，并非所有国家都是这种情况。

chunks.relation: 作 is not 的表语

original: Some relatively poor European countries have seen huge improvements across measures including civil society, income equality and environment.
translation_literal: 一些相对贫穷的欧洲国家在包括公民社会、收入平等和环境在内的各项指标上已经看到了巨大改善。

chunks.chinese: 一些相对贫穷的欧洲国家

chunks.relation: 作 have seen 的宾语

chunks.english: across measures including civil society, income equality and environment
chunks.chinese: 在包括公民社会、收入平等和环境在内的各项指标上
chunks.relation: 说明 improvements 涉及的范围

chunks.english: civil society, income equality and environment
chunks.chinese: 公民社会、收入平等和环境

sentence_patterns.explanation: including 后列出三个衡量领域。

original: This is a lesson that rich countries can learn: When GDP is no longer regarded as the sole measure of a country’s success, the world looks very different.
translation_literal: 这是富裕国家可以学习的一课：当 GDP 不再被视为一个国家成功的唯一衡量标准时，世界看起来会非常不同。

chunks.english: a lesson that rich countries can learn
chunks.chinese: 富裕国家可以学习的一课

chunks.english: When GDP is no longer regarded as the sole measure of a country’s success, the world looks very different
chunks.chinese: 当 GDP 不再被视为一个国家成功的唯一衡量标准时，世界看起来会非常不同
chunks.relation: 冒号后解释 lesson 的内容

chunks.english: When GDP is no longer regarded as the sole measure of a country’s success
chunks.chinese: 当 GDP 不再被视为一个国家成功的唯一衡量标准时
chunks.relation: 说明主句 looks 的时间/条件

chunks.english: as the sole measure of a country’s success
chunks.chinese: 作为一个国家成功的唯一衡量标准
chunks.relation: 补充说明 GDP 被视为什么

sentence_patterns.explanation: 冒号后完整句解释 lesson 的具体内容。

original: So, what Kennedy was referring to was that while GDP has been the most common method for measuring the economic activity of nations, as a measure, it is no longer enough.
translation_literal: 所以，肯尼迪所指的是，尽管 GDP 一直是衡量各国经济活动最常用的方法，但作为一种衡量标准，它已经不再足够。

chunks.english: that while GDP has been the most common method for measuring the economic activity of nations, as a measure, it is no longer enough
chunks.chinese: 尽管 GDP 一直是衡量各国经济活动最常用的方法，但作为一种衡量标准，它已经不再足够

chunks.english: while GDP has been the most common method for measuring the economic activity of nations
chunks.chinese: 尽管 GDP 一直是衡量各国经济活动最常用的方法
chunks.relation: 说明 it is no longer enough 的让步背景

chunks.english: the most common method for measuring the economic activity of nations
chunks.chinese: 衡量各国经济活动最常用的方法
chunks.relation: 作 has been 的表语
限定 it is no longer enough 的角度
表语从句主句的主语，指 GDP

sentence_patterns.explanation: while GDP has been... 表示“尽管”，不是时间。

original: It does not include important factors such as environmental quality or education outcomes — all things that contribute to a person’s sense of well-being.
translation_literal: 它不包括重要因素，例如环境质量或教育结果——这些都是有助于一个人福祉感的东西。

chunks.english: important factors such as environmental quality or education outcomes
chunks.chinese: 重要因素，例如环境质量或教育结果

chunks.english: such as environmental quality or education outcomes
chunks.chinese: 例如环境质量或教育结果

chunks.english: all things that contribute to a person’s sense of well-being
chunks.chinese: 所有有助于一个人福祉感的东西
chunks.relation: 破折号后概括说明这些 factors 的价值

chunks.english: that contribute to a person’s sense of well-being
chunks.chinese: 有助于一个人福祉感的

chunks.relation: 作 contribute to 的宾语

sentence_patterns.explanation: all things... 概括前面的 environmental quality 和 education outcomes。

original: The sharp hit to growth predicted around the world and in the UK could lead to a decline in the everyday services we depend on for our well-being and for growth.
translation_literal: 全球和英国预计会遭受的对增长的猛烈打击，可能导致我们为了福祉和增长所依赖的日常服务下降。

chunks.english: The sharp hit to growth predicted around the world and in the UK
chunks.chinese: 全球和英国预计会遭受的对增长的猛烈打击

chunks.english: predicted around the world and in the UK
chunks.chinese: 在全球和英国被预测的

chunks.english: a decline in the everyday services we depend on for our well-being and for growth
chunks.chinese: 我们为了福祉和增长所依赖的日常服务下降
chunks.relation: 作 lead to 的宾语

chunks.english: we depend on for our well-being and for growth
chunks.chinese: 我们为了福祉和增长所依赖的
chunks.relation: 省略 that 的定语从句，修饰 services

chunks.english: for our well-being and for growth
chunks.chinese: 为了我们的福祉和增长
chunks.relation: 说明 depend on 的目的/方面

sentence_patterns.pattern_name: 分裂结构 / 间隔结构
sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 长主语 + 谓语 + 长宾语定语从句
sentence_patterns.explanation: 主语和宾语都带修饰，主干是 The hit could lead to a decline。

original: But policymakers who refocus efforts on improving well-being rather than simply worrying about GDP figures could avoid the forecasted doom and may even see progress.
translation_literal: 但是，那些把努力重新集中在改善福祉上，而不是仅仅担心 GDP 数字的政策制定者，可能避免预测中的厄运，甚至可能看到进展。

chunks.english: policymakers who refocus efforts on improving well-being rather than simply worrying about GDP figures
chunks.chinese: 那些把努力重新集中在改善福祉上，而不是仅仅担心 GDP 数字的政策制定者

chunks.english: who refocus efforts on improving well-being rather than simply worrying about GDP figures
chunks.chinese: 把努力重新集中在改善福祉上，而不是仅仅担心 GDP 数字的

chunks.english: on improving well-being rather than simply worrying about GDP figures
chunks.chinese: 在改善福祉上，而不是仅仅担心 GDP 数字

sentence_patterns.pattern_name: 分裂结构 / 间隔结构
sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 主语 + who 定语从句 + 并列谓语
sentence_patterns.explanation: 主语 policymakers 被 who 从句拉长，主句谓语是 could avoid and may see。
